---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve the Flutter frontend or FastAPI backend.
title: "[BUG] "
labels: Bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Environment
- **Domain:** [Frontend / Backend]
- **OS:** [e.g. Windows 11, iOS]
- **App Version:** [e.g. v0.2.1]

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Logs / Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots or logs to help explain your problem.
